title: Weltgewebe temporal thread lifecycle
goal: Implement the user-authorized seven-day lifecycle of unbraided Weltgewebe threads as a deterministic, history-preserving domain projection while keeping durable yarn and adjacent cleanup work outside this first task.
completion: Unbraided threads decay deterministically from their canonical creation time over exactly 168 hours and disappear from active projections after expiry without erasing historical events.
Braided durable yarn remains exempt until a separately registered domain model defines and proves its lifecycle.
JSONL and PostgreSQL paths agree at clock boundaries, migration and replay are deterministic, and API and web projections preserve authorization and visibility contracts.
The implementation is merged only after exact-head CI, review evidence and a full downloadable diff establish the changed behavior.
Configuration cleanup, cache compaction and the complete yarn domain remain independently tracked rather than being hidden in the decay patch.

metadata.source: Bureau live-register candidate event 639 and direct user authorization on 2026-07-17
metadata.safety_boundary: No production deployment, data deletion, cache purge, configuration rewrite or foreign worktree mutation follows from registration. Historical truth must remain reconstructable and yarn must not be inferred from thread decay alone.
does_not_establish: a complete yarn or braiding domain
